title: Ability to zoom in and out to make fonts smaller bigger
excerpt:

posts.author: aow (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would like to suggest users are able to use CTRL+MOUSE Scroll up/down to zoom in and out of the board. If you use Microsoft Teams, you can do that. This because we have a few screen of different size. Some portable monitors are UHD and smaller in physical size. When we move the desktop app to this screen, we want to be able to instantly adjust the size of the text (zoom in, zoom out) .

Zoom out: fonts become smaller and can see more columns on screen
Zoom in: fonts become bigger and view lesser, useful for smaller screen sometimes.

posts.author: Monica.hutchinson (Monica Hutchinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

I like to see all of my columns on one screen, so what I’ve found works for me is pulling up monday in Chrome and clicking the 3 vertical dots to the far right of the url and adjusting the zoom percentage from there! Mine is set to 75%, but if you have a high number of columns, you can also adjust the zoom percentage even lower and switch to full screen mode which is the button to the right of the zoom plus and minus buttons!

Hope this helps!

posts.author: AnnieR (Anne Robson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to see this too, zooming out isn’t an option as it changes the browser settings for other open tabs which I don’t want to do
